examples.overview: Complete examples demonstrating the product documentation workflow and output format.

workflow_example.title: Complete Workflow Example
workflow_example.description: Step-by-step example of extracting products from a retail website and generating documentation.

step.example_code: <ask_followup_question> <question>What is the URL of the retail website you want to extract products from?</question> <follow_up> <suggest>http://localhost:3000/</suggest> <suggest>https://example-store.com/products</suggest> <suggest>Let me provide a different URL</suggest> </follow_up> </ask_followup_question>

step.note: Repeat scrolling until all products are visible

step.example_code:
<write_to_file> <path>product-data/iphone-15.md</path> <content> # iPhone 15 - Product Documentation
## Product Information - **Product ID:** 7 - **Product Name:** iPhone 15 - **Category:** Smartphones - **Price:** ₹79,900 - **Stock:** 15 units - **Rating:** 4.8/5.0
## Product Summary iPhone 15 is Apple's latest flagship smartphone featuring the powerful A16 Bionic chip... [Continue with full template]
